description: Recommended enforcement for NurseNest marketing i18n. Adjust certified-locales.json as locales complete QA.

rules.check: Every non-English overlay must contain every key from marketing-en.json; values must be non-empty strings.
Interpolation tokens {{name}} in each locale must match the English template for that key.

rules.when: I18N_ENFORCE_CERTIFIED is not 0/false AND locale is listed in src/content/i18n/certified-locales.json
rules.check: P0 keys (nav, auth, pricing, recovery, tools hub/errors/common/disclaimer, metadata titles) must not equal the English string.
rules.mitigation: Remove locale from certified-locales until translated, or set I18N_ENFORCE_CERTIFIED=0 for local experiments only.

rules.check: P1 keys (footer, hero, home marketing, calculator body copy under tools.*) may still match English; reported as warnings.
Long-tail keys; parity tracked structurally only.
Learner shell, checkout, and other non-marketing surfaces documented in i18n-production-surface-audit.json.

environmentVariables.I18N_ENFORCE_CERTIFIED: Default on: set to 0 to skip P0 leakage enforcement for certified locales (not recommended for release branches).
environmentVariables.I18N_QUIET: Set to 1 to suppress warning spam during validate (used in npm run build).
environmentVariables.CI: Typical CI should run full nursenest-core build with defaults (structural + certified P0 leakage).
